text.div:
VAMapsIG

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://va.gov/fhir/ImplementationGuide/va.maps

This implementation guide is a FHIR IG rendering of the KBS Map Set from VA sources (primarily VistA) to FHIR. Where appropriate these maps conform to the us-core profiles.

name: VAMapsIG
title: US Veterans Administration FHIR Map Set Implementation Guide
description: This implementation guide is a FHIR IG rendering of the KBS Map Set from VA sources (primarily VistA) to FHIR. Where appropriate these maps conform to the us-core profiles.

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack
